headline: Stryker Cyberattack Puts Spotlight On Resilient Identity And MFA Spending
summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) recently experienced a significant cyberattack that disrupted elements of its operations. In response, identity management provider Avatier has launched an emergency-ready Multi-Factor Authentication solution. The new offering centers on an air-gapped Identity Challenge Card designed to maintain secure access during system outages. This launch directly addresses vulnerabilities exposed by the incident and targets business continuity during future cyber events. Stryker, a...

headline: Geron Corporation (GERN) Appoints Timothy Williams as EVP, Chief Legal Officer
summary: Geron Corporation (NASDAQ:GERN) is one of the best growth stocks under $10 to invest in. On April 13, Geron Corporation appointed Timothy Williams as Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary. A seasoned legal executive, Williams joins the commercial-stage biopharma firm from Vanda Pharmaceuticals, where he served as Senior Vice President and General […]
